# 测量类最终验收报告模板-性能

## 门禁命令

```powershell
& "./scripts/run-tests-measurement-performance.ps1" -NoBuild -NoRestore -Verbosity minimal
```

## 结果表

| Operator | Budget (ms) | Mean (ms) | P95 (ms) | P99 (ms) | Pass / Fail | Notes |

| Measurement |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| CircleMeasurement |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| LineMeasurement |  |  |  |  |  |  |
